objective: Reduce wasted spend without reducing the converting exact target's traffic.
diagnosis: Broad traffic is spending above tolerance with weak conversion.
One exact target remains profitable and should be protected.

chosen_actions.scope: broad target: squeeze toys sensory bin
chosen_actions.guardrail: Keep the bid above the floor needed to maintain test traffic.
Apply only at the ad group where waste was observed.

verification_window.same_session: Check row acceptance and the exact entity scope.
verification_window.plus_24h: Review spend pacing and wasted query share.
verification_window.plus_72h: Check ACOS trend and confirm the converting exact target kept volume.

rollback_trigger: Rollback if spend drops on the converting exact target or if the negative blocks relevant traffic.
